observed_from_screenshot.scrape_seminars: Harvest job reached the seminars step and exited with code 1 after roughly 17 minutes.
observed_from_screenshot.scrape_festivals: Harvest job reached the festivals step and exited with code 1 after roughly 16 minutes.
observed_from_screenshot.node_warning: The visible Node.js 20 warning is platform/action-runtime deprecation noise, separate from the red harvest exit.

fixes: Moved workflow actions to Node 24-compatible majors: checkout@v7, setup-node@v6, setup-python@v6, upload-artifact@v7.
Added FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24 to expose Node 24 runtime compatibility early.
Added strict_harvest manual input; scheduled runs default to warning/skip behavior while manual strict runs can still fail red.
Added HARVEST_ATTEMPTS=2 retries around the external Claude CLI call.
Added structured timestamped and latest status JSON for seminars and festivals.
Fixed the latest-status contract consumed by summarize-harvest-status.js.
Kept missing CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN as a hard configuration failure.
Kept merge, schema, rebuild, and verify failures hard because those indicate site/data correctness problems.
Reduced seminars crawl pressure with SHARD_COUNT=8 and kept festivals on FESTIVAL_SHARD_COUNT=7.
Preserved the previous verified calendar when the external harvest fails, times out, exceeds budget, or returns malformed JSON.

verification.bash_syntax: scripts/seminars-prompt-runner.sh and scripts/festivals-prompt-runner.sh checked with bash -n
verification.guard: scripts/verify-harvest-pipeline.js now guards the scraper contract
